summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cognitive Offloading Research Tool with both participant and researcher interfaces. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with excellent design and user flows.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepting logout button clicks in some cases
ui_bugs.workaround: Navigation and core functionality not affected

passed_tests: All 37 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Participant landing page loads and functions correctly
Study code input and demographics form work properly
Protected routes and authentication state management
Researcher dashboard loads with proper stats and navigation
Experiments page displays existing experiments and create modal
Analytics page shows data visualization and export options
Progress tracker displays weekly tasks with create/edit functionality
Navigation between all researcher pages works correctly
Professional academic design with proper fonts and spacing
Proper error handling for invalid login attempts
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI fix needed: Modal overlay intercepting logout button clicks. This is a low priority issue as it doesn't affect core functionality or user workflows.
